rows.label: tev006301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our sickened brethren and children
will survive thanks to the
medicines you humans shared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006301_MSG0003
rows.name:
If there is aught I can do to repay this
kindness, I beg you to ask it of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006301_MSG0004
rows.name:
In all the campaigns I have
fought, I have never met a
people as strong as yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I yearn for an opportunity to fight
alongside your species again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006301_MSG0006
rows.name:
I hope there is a way for we Larsians
to maintain both our alliance and
our rivalry with humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev006301_MSG0007
rows.name:
For our species would surely drive each
other to levels of military prowess far
beyond what we can even imagine today![ST:wait ]
